languages.text: {n}{nc|Упрямо сжатая челюсть и горящий взгляд ярко-синих глаз придают Ювенне невероятное сходство с портретом Себериана в молодости.|Лицо Ювенны неподвижно, но поджатые губы и напряженно раздувающиеся ноздри говорят сами за себя.}{/n}

{n}{nc|With her stubbornly set jaw and blazing blue eyes, Juvenna bears an uncanny resemblance to the portrait of Seberian as a young man.|Juvenna's face is motionless, but her pinched lips and flared nostrils are more than telling.}{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}{nc|Упрямо сжатая челюсть и горящий взгляд ярко-синих глаз придают Ювенне невероятное сходство с портретом Себериана в молодости.|Лицо Ювенны неподвижно, но поджатые губы и напряженно раздувающиеся ноздри говорят сами за себя.}{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}{nc|With her stubbornly set jaw and blazing blue eyes, Juvenna bears an uncanny resemblance to the portrait of Seberian as a young man.|Juvenna's face is motionless, but her pinched lips and flared nostrils are more than telling.}{/n}

{n}{nc|With her stubbornly set jaw and blazing blue eyes, Juvenna bears an uncanny resemblance to the portrait of Seberian as a young man.|Juvenna's face is motionless, but her pinched lips and flared nostrils are more than telling.}{/n}

{n}{nc|With her stubbornly set jaw and blazing blue eyes, Juvenna bears an uncanny resemblance to the portrait of Seberian as a young man.|Juvenna's face is motionless, but her pinched lips and flared nostrils are more than telling.}{/n}

languages.text: {n}{nc|Con su mandíbula firmemente apretada y el fuego de sus ojos azules, Juvenna muestra una semejanza inquietante con el retrato de Seberian de joven.|El rostro de Juvenna permanece inmóvil, pero sus labios apretados y su nariz ensanchada son más que expresivos.}{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}{nc|With her stubbornly set jaw and blazing blue eyes, Juvenna bears an uncanny resemblance to the portrait of Seberian as a young man.|Juvenna's face is motionless, but her pinched lips and flared nostrils are more than telling.}{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}{nc|Con su mandíbula firmemente apretada y el fuego de sus ojos azules, Juvenna muestra una semejanza inquietante con el retrato de Seberian de joven.|El rostro de Juvenna permanece inmóvil, pero sus labios apretados y su nariz ensanchada son más que expresivos.}{/n}

languages.text: {n}{nc|尤文娜倔强地紧绷着下颌，蓝色的双眸中仿佛燃烧着怒火。此时的她，与塞贝里安年轻时的画像简直惊人地相似。|尤文娜虽然面无表情，但她紧抿的双唇和翕动的鼻翼却早已将她的心思表露无遗。}{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}{nc|With her stubbornly set jaw and blazing blue eyes, Juvenna bears an uncanny resemblance to the portrait of Seberian as a young man.|Juvenna's face is motionless, but her pinched lips and flared nostrils are more than telling.}{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}{nc|尤文娜倔强地紧绷着下颌，蓝色的双眸中仿佛燃烧着怒火。此时的她，与塞贝里安年轻时的画像简直惊人地相似。|尤文娜虽然面无表情，但她紧抿的双唇和翕动的鼻翼却早已将她的心思表露无遗。}{/n}

languages.text: {n}{nc|Avec son air buté, ses mâchoires serrées et son regard bleu vif, Juvenna accuse une ressemblance troublante avec le portrait de Seberian jeune.|Si les traits de la jeune femme demeurent figés, ses lèvres pincées et ses narines dilatées parlent pour elle.}{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}{nc|With her stubbornly set jaw and blazing blue eyes, Juvenna bears an uncanny resemblance to the portrait of Seberian as a young man.|Juvenna's face is motionless, but her pinched lips and flared nostrils are more than telling.}{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}{nc|Avec son air buté, ses mâchoires serrées et son regard bleu vif, Juvenna accuse une ressemblance troublante avec le portrait de Seberian jeune.|Si les traits de la jeune femme demeurent figés, ses lèvres pincées et ses narines dilatées parlent pour elle.}{/n}

languages.text: {n}{nc|With her stubbornly set jaw and blazing blue eyes, Juvenna bears an uncanny resemblance to the portrait of Seberian as a young man.|Juvenna's face is motionless, but her pinched lips and flared nostrils are more than telling.}{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}{nc|With her stubbornly set jaw and blazing blue eyes, Juvenna bears an uncanny resemblance to the portrait of Seberian as a young man.|Juvenna's face is motionless, but her pinched lips and flared nostrils are more than telling.}{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}{nc|With her stubbornly set jaw and blazing blue eyes, Juvenna bears an uncanny resemblance to the portrait of Seberian as a young man.|Juvenna's face is motionless, but her pinched lips and flared nostrils are more than telling.}{/n}

languages.text: {n}{nc|Mit ihren scharfen Kieferknochen und ihren strahlend blauen Augen sieht Juvenna dem Porträt des jungen Seberian verblüffend ähnlich.|In Juvennas Gesicht regt sich kein Muskel, aber ihre verkniffenen Lippen und geblähten Nasenflügel sagen alles.}{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}{nc|With her stubbornly set jaw and blazing blue eyes, Juvenna bears an uncanny resemblance to the portrait of Seberian as a young man.|Juvenna's face is motionless, but her pinched lips and flared nostrils are more than telling.}{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}{nc|Mit ihren scharfen Kieferknochen und ihren strahlend blauen Augen sieht Juvenna dem Porträt des jungen Seberian verblüffend ähnlich.|In Juvennas Gesicht regt sich kein Muskel, aber ihre verkniffenen Lippen und geblähten Nasenflügel sagen alles.}{/n}

languages.text: {n}{nc|ユベナは頑固に結んだ顎と燃えるような青い瞳で、若き日のセベリアンの肖像画と不気味なほどそっくりだ。|ユベナの顔は微動だにしないが、すぼめた唇と膨らんだ鼻孔が、何よりも雄弁に物語っている。}{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}{nc|With her stubbornly set jaw and blazing blue eyes, Juvenna bears an uncanny resemblance to the portrait of Seberian as a young man.|Juvenna's face is motionless, but her pinched lips and flared nostrils are more than telling.}{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}{nc|ユベナは頑固に結んだ顎と燃えるような青い瞳で、若き日のセベリアンの肖像画と不気味なほどそっくりだ。|ユベナの顔は微動だにしないが、すぼめた唇と膨らんだ鼻孔が、何よりも雄弁に物語っている。}{/n}
